notes: Gradients through the linear solve use jax.lax.custom_linear_solve.
The validation checks implicit differentiation against centered finite differences.
The geometry map is a differentiable Boozer-harmonic sensitivity scaffold, not a full VMEC boundary optimization claim.
metadata.scope: Bounded manuscript artifact: validates implicit differentiation through a pinned SFINCS full-system linear solve and differentiable scheme-4 Boozer harmonic maps. It does not claim full VMEC-boundary optimization.
